title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 0–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Cracker, Unknown person #4 as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "Gear 4" breaks through!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: 2 of our 3 Commanders have arrived!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As of now, Lord Katakuri*...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and Lord smoothie are the ones that have reported in!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mamama- Mama... It's been quite some time since I've gathered all three under the same roof...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Speaking of which, what's taking cracker so long?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Big bro!!

dialogue.speaker: Cracker
dialogue.text: Big Brother Cracker !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This can't be!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's one of our 3 command- ERS!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Strawhat Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who the hell's responsible for this?! I'll beat them to a pulp!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Brother, if memory serves me right, he was last seen heading towards the seducing woods to take care of our "Straw hat Luffy" problem.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you really think he came flying from there?! The enemy has to be near-fa!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Minister of Cheese (19th Son of the Charlotte Family) Charlotte Mont D'Or

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: minister of whipped cream (5th son of the Charlotte family) CHARLOTTE OPEN

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ministers of butter (18th daughter of the Charlotte family) Charlotte Galette

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is close by-fAA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen, please forgive me for not having more faith in you earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was convinced that you had no hope of victory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We are officially in Red Alert!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stay indoors! Lockdown shall com- mence imme- dialy!!

dialogue.speaker: Cracker
dialogue.text: Lord Cracker was man- handled by someone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: whereze whereze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GASP bugs

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Found, you need to learn not to say exactly what's on your mind!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: whereze whereze

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think I've just eaten a lifetime's worth of biscuits...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy, am I imagining it or are you starting to shrink a bit?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am. Dear 4 takes up a whole lot of stamina so I burn through calories much quicker.

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 34 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
